_comment: Persona-build scenarios for the Cinema loading-timing harness. Grounded in the 25 connectors actually credentialed in this machine's vault (persona_credentials). Ordered roughly short -> long / 1 tool -> 5 tools, to span the range of process-automation needs so we can measure how the >60s first-question wait varies with intent complexity and tune the cinema pacing to reality. `expectedTools` = service_types we expect the resolver to bind; `complexity` = our a-priori guess (validated against measured timing).

scenarios.title: Remember-notes memory log
scenarios.intent: Whenever I give you a note to remember, save it to my local database so I can search and recall it later.

scenarios.title: Morning database digest
scenarios.intent: Every morning at 8am, read the newest entries from my local database and give me a short digest of what changed.

scenarios.title: GitHub issue to Discord ping
scenarios.intent: When a new GitHub issue is assigned to me, send me a Discord message with the issue title and a link.

scenarios.title: Unread Gmail triage
scenarios.intent: Read my unread Gmail, sort the messages by urgency, and log a one-line summary of each to my local database.

scenarios.title: Stock movement alerter
scenarios.intent: Every hour, fetch AAPL and TSLA prices from Alpha Vantage and alert me on Discord if either moves more than 3 percent.

scenarios.title: Linear-done to Notion + Discord
scenarios.intent: When a Linear issue is marked Done, write a summary of it to Notion and post a short note in Discord for the team.

scenarios.title: Drive-watching knowledge base
scenarios.intent: Watch my local Drive folder for new documents, embed them into my vector database, and let me search across them by asking questions in plain language.

scenarios.title: Sentry incident responder
scenarios.intent: When Sentry reports a new unresolved error, pull the referenced file from GitHub, draft a root-cause summary, and open a Discord thread for the team to triage.

scenarios.title: Pre-meeting briefing concierge
scenarios.intent: Before each Cal.com meeting, look up the attendee in Attio and email me a one-page briefing through Gmail so I walk in prepared.

scenarios.title: Weekday operations brief pipeline
scenarios.intent: Every weekday at 8am, pull my Asana tasks due today, cross-check my Google Calendar for conflicts, summarize the top priorities, log the brief to my local database, and send it to me on Discord.
